title: SIGSEGV after calling SystemVerilog task from C function

features.name: dpi-c export task with procedural timing control
features.description: Code should include an exported DPI-C task that uses procedural timing control (@(negedge clock)) inside the task body

features.name: dpi-c import task calling exported sv task
features.description: Code should include a DPI-C import function that calls an exported DPI-C SV task which uses timing control

features.name: dpi-c callback return type mismatch with coroutine
features.description: Code should include a DPI exported task that uses timing control, where the callback typedef returns void but the actual implementation returns coroutine type
